_description: Central Azure Monitor configuration for the ecommerce orders pipeline. All resource names/IDs are parameterised – substitute real values before deploying.

custom_tables.description: Custom table for all pipeline stage events (ingest / transform / quality)

pipeline_metrics.name: IngestRowCount
pipeline_metrics.description: Number of rows written to staging during ingest

pipeline_metrics.name: IngestDurationSeconds
pipeline_metrics.description: Wall-clock time for the ingest stage

pipeline_metrics.name: TransformDurationSeconds
pipeline_metrics.description: Wall-clock time for the transform stage

pipeline_metrics.name: QualityCheckFailures
pipeline_metrics.description: Count of [FAIL] results from quality_checks.py in a run

log_queries.recent_pipeline_errors: PipelineEvents_CL | where Status == 'ERROR' | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 50
log_queries.daily_ingest_summary: PipelineEvents_CL | where Stage == 'ingest' and Status == 'SUCCESS' | summarize avg(RowCount), max(RowCount), min(RowCount) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
log_queries.quality_failures_last_7d: QualityCheckResults_CL | where Result == 'FAIL' | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize count() by CheckName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
log_queries.pipeline_duration_trend: PipelineEvents_CL | where Stage in ('ingest','transform') | summarize avg(DurationSeconds) by Stage, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | render timechart
